name: krb5-config
title: krb5-config
description:
Configuration files for Kerberos Version 5
This package provides /etc/krb5.conf and any other files needed to
configure Kerberos Version 5.  This package may be used with one of the
implementations of Kerberos in Debian, or with a locally built Kerberos.
Generally this package will be installed as part of installing some
Kerberos implementation.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use krb5-config because Configuration files for Kerberos Version 5.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use krb5-config as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair krb5-config with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `krb5-config --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
